items.title: Can't get a prescription renewed? Here's how to cope with prior authorizations
items.description: These health care hurdles can stand in the way of getting treatment your doctor says you need. Here's what to know about how to deal with them.

items.title: Here are 5 health topics Trump avoided in his SOTU speech
items.description: Despite President Trump's aim to make health care a "Republican issue" for the midterms, his speech left out scientific research, MAHA, abortion and r...

items.title: Surgeon general nominee Means questioned about vaccines, birth control and financial conflicts
items.description: During a confirmation hearing, senators asked Dr. Casey Means about her current positions and her past statements on a range of public health issues.

items.title: Hundreds of American nurses choose Canada over the U.S. under Trump
items.description: More than 1,000 American nurses have successfully applied for licensure in British Columbia since April, a massive increase over prior years.

items.title: China and the U.S. alter foreign aid strategies
items.description: China's foreign aid strategy has shifted in the last few decades Now its model may be the one the U.S. is adopting even as China moves away from it.
